面对门外老大的死亡威胁，楚河内心慌得一批。
……
神秘翻牌系统降临，每日将从五张问号牌中抽取来自诸天万界的宝物。
它能是功法、神器、宝物、钱财、修为等等，应有尽有，一切皆看运气。
【选择催眠眼镜。】
系统：“我给你催眠眼镜，你催眠樱花姐妹花？你是人人啊？”
【选择言出法随。】
系统：“我给你言出法随，你让人卸甲？！”
【选择时间停止，咦？时间停止？那我岂不是能……】
系统：“宿主收起你的想法，我警告你，咱可以正经系统（愤怒）”
楚河：“难道不是我这么用的吗？不然你每天给我刷些奇奇怪怪的东西干什么？”
系统：“……”
从此以后，楚河一路无敌，身怀诸天财宝，身旁佳丽环绕，镇压世间。
“你是古武？不好意思我修仙滴！”
说罢，楚河在众人面前御剑飞行潇洒离开，震惊全球。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/a84682fd4ec6e9093d1a1ed332c6c15b","author":"几重烟雨","author_id":"","book_id":"7449981069639552024","book_name":"每日翻牌：我修仙者，你惹不起！","book_short_name":"肆意修仙人生","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#101010","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"7502人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":124,"name":"都市修真","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=124&name=都市修真&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":91,"name":"多女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91&name=多女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":384,"name":"无敌","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=384&name=无敌&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7451899059696042558","read_count":"7502","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1110156"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.2","serial_count":"534","tags":"都市修真,都市,系统,穿越,多女主,无敌","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/33ceef9895c4e150474df5568c5b635a~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779437024&x-signature=0Iyzx6eJhwE8krZfrYFdRkccKxc%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"839653359366012","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"68"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603231603442CD500EC2B5B950E2FE4"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读4小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":1,"forwarded_count":0,"li
